Notes: Shaw wins 5th straight game ... Ashley Rosario (GBC) becomes 8th player in
school history to play 100 career games ... Taylor Dalrymple (SHAW) has 2nd
20-point game of season ... Jacinda Jones (GBC) has season-high 8 rebounds.
Game.Officials: James Discher (R),  Sabrina Isom,  Jeffrey O'Brien
